rounds.question: Can you provide me with a list of the participating countries in the 2022 Winter Olympics opening ceremony?

rounds.answer: The 2022 Winter Olympics featured a diverse group of countries participating in the opening ceremony. These included ... Athletes from over 90 countries will enter the stadium in a specific order.
